message:
Add string.gmatch iterator, pcall/xpcall, and Lua scripting conformance tests

Implement __gmatch_iter for stateful string.gmatch iteration with
capture-group row tables. Add pcall() and xpcall() support for
protected Lua calls. Extend the conformance fixture suite with 299
lines of new test cases covering gmatch iteration, protected calls,
error handling, table manipulation, and string pattern matching.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

'world')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "world" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_match_no_match", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.match('hello', 'xyz')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": null + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_match_pattern_digit", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.match('abc123def', '%d+')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "123" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_match_capture", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.match('key:value', '(%a+):(%a+)')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "key" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_match_alpha_class", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.match('123abc456', '%a+')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "abc" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_find_pattern", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "local s, e = string.find('hello123', '%d+')\nreturn s", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "integer", + "value": 6 + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_find_pattern_end", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "local s, e = string.find('hello123', '%d+')\nreturn e", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "integer", + "value": 8 + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_find_anchored", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "local s = string.find('hello', '^hel')\nreturn s", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "integer", + "value": 1 + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_find_anchor_fail", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "local s = string.find('hello', '^ell')\nif s then return s else return 0 end", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "integer", + "value": 0 + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_gsub_literal", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.gsub('hello world', 'world', 'lua')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "hello lua" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_gsub_pattern", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.gsub('abc 123 def 456', '%d+', 'N')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "abc N def N" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_gsub_with_limit", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.gsub('aaa', 'a', 'b', 2)", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "bba" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_gsub_capture_ref", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.gsub('hello', '(h)', '%1%1')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "hhello" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_match_set", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.match('abc123', '[a-z]+')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "abc" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_match_negated_set", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.match('abc123', '[^a-z]+')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "123" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_match_dot_star", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.match('hello', '.+')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "hello" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_match_lazy", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.match('text', '<(.-)>')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "b" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_match_optional", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.match('colour', 'colou?r')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "colour" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_match_optional_absent", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.match('color', 'colou?r')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "color" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_gsub_whitespace", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.gsub('hello world', '%s+', '-')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "hello-world" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_match_end_anchor", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "return string.match('hello.lua', '%.lua$')", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": ".lua" + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_gmatch_words", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "local t = {}\nfor w in string.gmatch('one two three', '%a+') do\n table.insert(t, w)\nend\nreturn #t", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "integer", + "value": 3 + } + }, + { + "name": "eval_string_gmatch_first_word", + "now_ms": 0, + "argv": [ + "EVAL", + "local t = {}\nfor w in string.gmatch('one two three', '%a+') do\n table.insert(t, w)\nend\nreturn t[1]", + "0" + ], + "expect": { + "kind": "bulk", + "value": "one" + } } ] }
